root_text.an10.49:1.3: Sītaṁ, uṇhaṁ, jighacchā, pipāsā, uccāro, passāvo, kāyasaṁvaro, vacīsaṁvaro, ājīvasaṁvaro, ponobhaviko bhavasaṅkhāro—
root_text.an10.49:1.4: ime kho, bhikkhave, dasa dhammā sarīraṭṭhā”ti.

translation_text.an10.49:1.1: “Mendicants, these ten things exist because of the body.
translation_text.an10.49:1.3: Cold, heat, hunger, thirst, feces, urine, restraint of body, speech, and livelihood, and the will to live that leads to future lives.
translation_text.an10.49:1.4: These ten things exist because of the body.”
